allowDatabases.description: List of database paths or glob patterns agents are allowed to access. Use '*' to allow all.

denyDatabases.description: List of database paths or glob patterns agents are denied access to.

defaultDatabase.description: Default database path to use if not specified in command

maxRows.description: Maximum number of rows to return in query results

readonly.description: When true, only allow SELECT queries

examples.description: List all tables in a database
Show schema for a specific table
